props.title: How We Execute Ground-Up Projects
props.description: Our proven three-phase approach ensures your electrical construction is completed safely, efficiently, and to the highest standards.

projects.title: Phase 1: Design & Planning
projects.description: We review plans, calculate loads, design distribution systems, and obtain permits [...]

projects.title: Phase 2: Rough-In Installation
projects.description: Install conduit, boxes, panels, and run all wiring throughout the structure [...]

projects.title: Phase 3: Finish & Inspection
projects.description: Install fixtures, test systems, coordinate inspections, and energize facility [...]

props.title: Ground-Up Construction FAQ
props.description: Common questions about our ground-up electrical construction services.

faqs.question: What is included in ground-up electrical construction?
faqs.answer: Ground-up electrical construction includes complete electrical system design, permit acquisition, main service installation, power distribution, all wiring, lighting systems, data infrastructure, emergency power, and final inspections.

faqs.question: How long does electrical installation take for new construction?
faqs.answer: Timeline varies based on building size and complexity. We provide detailed schedules during the planning phase and coordinate with your construction timeline to ensure on-time completion.

faqs.question: Do you handle electrical permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle all permit applications and coordinate all required electrical inspections with local authorities throughout the construction process.

faqs.question: Can you work with our architect and general contractor?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We regularly collaborate with architects, engineers, and general contractors to ensure seamless project coordination and successful outcomes.

faqs.question: What types of buildings do you wire?
faqs.answer: We handle all types of commercial construction including office buildings, retail spaces, restaurants, warehouses, medical facilities, and industrial buildings.

faqs.question: Do you provide as-built documentation?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete as-built electrical drawings and documentation upon project completion for your records and future reference.
